notes: The EW 135P G4 is a two-piece portable wireless system comprising the EK 100 G4 camera-mount receiver and the SKM 100 G4 handheld transmitter. The only wired signal I/O port on the system is the locking 3.5mm TRS audio output on the EK 100 G4 receiver. The IR sync window is an optical (non-wired) interface and is not counted as a connector port. Both units are battery-powered (2x AA each); there is no DC power inlet connector on either unit — the optional DC2 adapter inserts into the battery compartment rather than a dedicated power jack, so no power port is included here. The SKM 100 G4 transmitter has no wired audio input; the MMD 835-1 mic capsule threads on via a proprietary screw mount. Locking nature of the 3.5mm jack confirmed by third-party cable listings (e.g., Cable Techniques, eBay listings for locking 3.5mm TRS to XLR cables specifically for EK 100 G4). Not rack-mountable.

ports.name: Audio Out
ports.note: Locking 3.5mm TRS jack socket on EK 100 G4 receiver; +12 dBu, mono, unbalanced. Included CL 1 (3.5mm–3.5mm) and CL 100 (3.5mm–XLR) cables provided.
